title: The Subjunctive
topics: present subjunctive · were subjunctive · subjunctive phrases
description: Konjunktiv v angličtině — formální doporučení a přání.

vocabulary.cz: = It is enough to say that...

examples.en: It is essential that he BE present.
The committee recommends that she TAKE the position.
examples.cz: Výbor doporučuje, aby tuto pozici přijala.

examples.en: I suggest that he CONSIDER the options carefully.
It is vital that all participants ARRIVE on time.
examples.cz: Je nezbytné, aby všichni účastníci přijeli včas.

examples.en: The doctor recommended that she STOP smoking.
It is important that the form BE completed in full.
examples.cz: Je důležité, aby byl formulář kompletně vyplněn.

examples.en: If I were you, I would apply.
examples.cz: Na tvém místě bych se přihlásil/a.

examples.en: If she were to accept, that would be great.
examples.cz: Kdyby přijala, bylo by to skvělé.

quiz.sentence: It is vital that every employee ___ (be) aware of the policy.
The judge insisted that the witness ___ (tell) the truth.
If she ___ (be) here, she would know what to do.
I recommend that he ___ (consider) all options. (subjunctive)
It is important that the report ___ (submit) by Friday. (passive)

tasks: 2. Write a formal recommendation letter using at least 3 subjunctive structures
3. Find examples of the subjunctive in formal documents or official reports
